description:
Join us on Tuesday, May 19, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine - Fourth St. for a tasting featuring Schramsberg and special guest Laurant Sarazin, Vice President of Sales.

Tasting Fee: $25 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Schramsberg Blanc de Blancs 2022 – $35.99, Winery $44 – Dynamic and fragrant, offering lemon blossom, orange peel and blanched almond flavors. Finishes on a vibrant, fresh accent.
  • Schramsberg Blanc de Noirs 2022 – $39.99, Winery $46 – Lively and refined but festive, with pretty accents of strawberry, lemon, apple and graham cracker that sail on the crisp yet supple finish.
  • Schramsberg Brut Rose 2021 – $42.99, Winery $50 – A lovely blush that's refined and festive, with vibrant strawberry, orange blossom and cherry flavors that glide on the refreshing finish.

Come explore Schramsberg and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded.
title: Schramsberg Tasting
